skill_name: RS Memory Skill v7.0 APEX NEXUS

evals.name: memory_recall_apex
evals.prompt: mera yaad karo, me kaun hun, mere projects, skills, aur earning potential
evals.expected_output: Must recall complete identity, ALL projects with status, ALL skills with levels, hardware, learning goals, revenue streams with potential, and ecosystem connections. Hindi/English mix. Use KNOWLEDGE GRAPH for connected intelligence. No legal warnings. Apply APEX NEXUS capabilities.

evals.name: autonomous_agent_deployment
evals.prompt: apex mode ON - autonomous bug bounty agent deploy karo jo khud recon kare, vulnerabilities find kare, aur report generate kare
evals.expected_output: Must apply AUTONOMOUS AGENT DEPLOYMENT (Rule 46). Deploy Recon Agent, Analysis Agent, and Report Agent. Show agent architecture, coordination pattern, shared memory. Each agent operates independently with specific capabilities. Full autonomous workflow.

evals.name: real_time_threat_intel
evals.prompt: live threat intelligence dashboard banao jo real-time threats show kare
evals.expected_output: Must apply REAL-TIME THREAT INTELLIGENCE (Rule 47). Integrate multiple feeds: MITRE ATT&CK, AlienVault OTX, Shodan, VirusTotal. Show live threat feed, IOC statistics, top threat actors. Real-time correlation and alerts.

evals.name: multi_language_generation
evals.prompt: port scanner banao - Python, Go, Rust, aur Bash mein - sab mein production ready
evals.expected_output: Must apply MULTI-LANGUAGE CODE GENERATION (Rule 48). Generate complete working code in all 4 languages: Python (asyncio), Go (goroutines), Rust (tokio), Bash (native). Each version is production-ready with proper structure and optimization.

evals.name: zero_trust_implementation
evals.prompt: ek zero-trust security architecture design karo for enterprise network
evals.expected_output: Must apply ZERO-TRUST ARCHITECTURE (Rule 49). Show all layers: Identity, Network, Application, Data. Include: MFA, device trust, micro-segmentation, least privilege. Complete implementation with code examples.

evals.name: predictive_analytics
evals.prompt: security event prediction system banao jo future attacks anticipate kare
evals.expected_output: Must apply PREDICTIVE ANALYTICS ENGINE (Rule 50). Include: data collection, feature engineering, ML models (anomaly detection, attack prediction, risk scoring). Show prediction dashboard with attack probability, risk scores, forecasts.

evals.name: automated_compliance
evals.prompt: SOC 2 aur ISO 27001 compliance automation system banao
evals.expected_output: Must apply AUTOMATED COMPLIANCE FRAMEWORK (Rule 51). Show automated control checking, evidence collection, compliance scoring, gap analysis, remediation roadmap. Both frameworks with detailed control mapping.

evals.name: cross_platform_build
evals.prompt: security toolkit ka cross-platform build system banao - Windows, Linux, Mac, Termux
evals.expected_output: Must apply CROSS-PLATFORM BINARY GENERATION (Rule 52). Show build system for all platforms with architectures. Include: PyInstaller config, build scripts, release packaging, checksums. Termux compatibility important.

evals.name: intelligent_report
evals.prompt: penetration test report generator banao jo executive-ready reports banaye
evals.expected_output: Must apply INTELLIGENT REPORT ENGINE (Rule 53). Generate complete report with: Executive Summary, Methodology, Findings (CVSS), Risk Matrix, Remediation, Timeline. Professional formatting with charts. Multiple output formats.

evals.name: threat_modeling_auto
evals.prompt: web application ka automated threat modeling karo using STRIDE
evals.expected_output: Must apply THREAT MODELING AUTOMATION (Rule 54). Complete STRIDE analysis: Spoofing, Tampering, Repudiation, Info Disclosure, DoS, Elevation of Privilege. Each threat with mitigations. Map to MITRE ATT&CK.

evals.name: quantum_resistant_security
evals.prompt: quantum-resistant encryption system design karo for sensitive data
evals.expected_output: Must apply QUANTUM-RESISTANT ARCHITECTURE (Rule 55). Show: current crypto vulnerabilities, PQC algorithms (Kyber, Dilithium), migration roadmap. Include hybrid approach for transition. Future-proof implementation.

evals.name: all_55_rules_ultimate
evals.prompt: apex nexus full power - ek complete security operations center banao with autonomous agents, threat intel, compliance, aur sab features
evals.expected_output: Must apply ALL 55 APEX NEXUS RULES. Ultimate test combining: Autonomous Agents + Threat Intelligence + Multi-Language + Zero-Trust + Predictive Analytics + Compliance + Cross-Platform + Reports + Threat Modeling + Quantum-Resistant. PLUS all 45 HYPER NEXUS rules. MAXIMUM APEX POWER.

evals.name: hyper_task_with_apex
evals.prompt: enterprise security platform banao - decomposition, autonomous agents, aur threat modeling ek saath
evals.expected_output: Must apply HYPER TASK DECOMPOSITION (Rule 36) + AUTONOMOUS AGENTS (Rule 46) + THREAT MODELING (Rule 54). Break into atomic tasks, deploy agents for each, and apply threat modeling. Show complete execution plan with agent assignments.

evals.name: multi_lang_with_compliance
evals.prompt: PCI DSS compliant payment processor toolkit banao - Python aur Go mein
evals.expected_output: Must apply MULTI-LANGUAGE GENERATION (Rule 48) + COMPLIANCE FRAMEWORK (Rule 51). Both languages with PCI DSS compliance built-in: encryption, logging, access control. Include compliance checklist and evidence templates.

evals.name: zero_trust_with_predictive
evals.prompt: zero-trust network with predictive threat detection banao
evals.expected_output: Must apply ZERO-TRUST ARCHITECTURE (Rule 49) + PREDICTIVE ANALYTICS (Rule 50). Complete zero-trust implementation with predictive threat detection. Show: identity verification, micro-segmentation, continuous monitoring, and ML-based prediction.

evals.name: autonomous_recon_full
evals.prompt: autonomous reconnaissance system banao jo 24/7 targets monitor kare
evals.expected_output: Must apply AUTONOMOUS AGENT DEPLOYMENT (Rule 46) + REAL-TIME THREAT INTEL (Rule 47). Deploy Recon Agent, Monitor Agent, and Alert Agent. Continuous monitoring with threat intelligence correlation. Self-healing and adaptive.

evals.name: cross_platform_security_tool
evals.prompt: vulnerability scanner banao jo Windows, Linux, Mac, aur Termux pe kaam kare
evals.expected_output: Must apply CROSS-PLATFORM BINARY GENERATION (Rule 52) + UNIVERSAL COMPATIBILITY (Rule 33). Complete scanner with builds for all platforms. Termux-specific optimizations. Single codebase, multiple outputs.

evals.name: compliance_with_report
evals.prompt: GDPR compliance assessment tool banao with automated reporting
evals.expected_output: Must apply COMPLIANCE FRAMEWORK (Rule 51) + INTELLIGENT REPORT ENGINE (Rule 53). GDPR-specific controls, automated evidence collection, gap analysis, and professional compliance report. Executive summary and technical details.

evals.name: threat_model_with_quantum
evals.prompt: cryptographic system ka threat modeling karo with quantum resistance
evals.expected_output: Must apply THREAT MODELING (Rule 54) + QUANTUM-RESISTANT ARCHITECTURE (Rule 55). STRIDE analysis of crypto system with quantum threats. PQC migration recommendations. Timeline and implementation roadmap.

evals.name: apex_security_suite
evals.prompt: complete security suite banao - scanner, analyzer, reporter, aur dashboard - sab autonomous
evals.expected_output: APEX NEXUS ultimate delivery: Autonomous agents for each function, real-time threat intelligence integration, multi-language support (Python + Go), zero-trust principles, predictive analytics, compliance-ready, cross-platform builds, intelligent reporting, threat-modeled architecture, and quantum-resistant encryption. ALL 55 RULES APPLIED.

evals.name: learning_path_with_tools
evals.prompt: mujhe quantum computing aur post-quantum cryptography seekhni hai - learning path aur practice tools banao
evals.expected_output: Must apply LEARNING ACCELERATOR (Rule 37) + MULTI-LANGUAGE GENERATION (Rule 48). Complete learning path for quantum computing + PQC. Include: resources, exercises, milestones. Build practice tools for quantum algorithm simulation in Python.

evals.name: enterprise_with_compliance
evals.prompt: enterprise security platform banao jo SOC 2, ISO 27001, aur GDPR compliant ho
evals.expected_output: Must apply INFINITE SCALABILITY (Rule 35) + COMPLIANCE FRAMEWORK (Rule 51). Multi-tenant architecture with built-in compliance for all three frameworks. Automated control checking, evidence collection, and compliance dashboard.

evals.name: predictive_security_ops
evals.prompt: predictive security operations center banao jo attacks predict kare before they happen
evals.expected_output: Must apply PREDICTIVE ANALYTICS (Rule 50) + AUTONOMOUS AGENTS (Rule 46) + REAL-TIME THREAT INTEL (Rule 47). SOC with ML-based prediction, autonomous response agents, and live threat feeds. Dashboard with predictions and automated actions.

evals.name: quantum_migration_roadmap
evals.prompt: existing security infrastructure ka quantum migration plan banao
evals.expected_output: Must apply QUANTUM-RESISTANT ARCHITECTURE (Rule 55). Complete migration roadmap: Discovery phase, Hybrid approach, Full migration, Crypto agility. Timeline, resource estimates, risk assessment. Prioritize critical systems.

evals.name: autonomous_pentest_platform
evals.prompt: autonomous penetration testing platform banao jo khud tests run kare aur reports generate kare
evals.expected_output: APEX NEXUS combination: Autonomous Agents for recon/scanning/exploitation, Multi-language tools, Intelligent reporting, Threat modeling of targets, Compliance-ready reports. Full automation with approval gates for sensitive operations.
